question: Where is the soccer player in the image? Select from the following options: (A) in the center of the football field. (B) standing in front of the goalpost. (C) walking towards the spectators. (D) being tackled by a member of the opposite team.
gold_answer: standing in front of the goalpost
answer_choices: in the center of the football field
standing in front of the goalpost
being tackled by a member of the opposite team
inpaint_prompt: Fill the masked region naturally, removing whatever objects appear there. Preserve the rest of the image exactly.
